content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Thu, 19 Feb 2026 04:36:09 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 320 | Critical: 27 | High: 57 | Medium: 204 | Low: 32

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [EAST ASIA] Satellite photos show Iran repairing and fortifying key sites amid tensions with US (SCMP)
  [UKRAINE] Russia's space military program raises concerns – Canadian general (Ukrinform)
  [MILITARY] Iran-US nuclear talks may fail due to both nations’ red lines – but that doesn’t make them futile (Defense News)
  [MILITARY] Iran-US nuclear talks may fail due to both nations’ red lines – but that doesn’t make them futile (Military Times)
  [GLOBAL] Martial law, protests and a president tried for insurrection: How did South Korea get here? (BBC World)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (78 events, 6 critical, 6 high):
    - Several Israeli airstrikes on southern Lebanon just now
    - Israeli troops raid Hebron, nab suspects for questioning after reports of gunfire
    - US is withdrawing all 1,000 troops from Syria: WSJ report
  Ukraine/Russia (82 events, 6 critical, 23 high):
    - Russia's space military program raises concerns – Canadian general
    - I recently spoke with a civilian living in the city of Druzhkivka, Donetsk Oblast, which is around 9 km from the frontline
    - Police detain suspect who helped draft-age men depart abroad for $12,000 in Kharkiv
  Europe (13 events, 5 critical, 3 high):
    - In Belgorod and its surrounding areas, another blackout occurred as a result of another missile attack
    - ‼️ 🇷🇺 ❤️ “Welcome to a new life
    - ‼️ 🇷🇺 Demographics – a national priority for Russia over the coming years, – Putin Statements made by the President during meetings with the government: ▪️ Russia will improve...
  Global (75 events, 4 critical, 16 high):
    - US to withdraw troops from Syria as tensions mount with Iran
    - The governor of Leningrad Oblast reported that several drones were destroyed by the air defense forces in the Kirishsky District
    - Martial law, protests and a president tried for insurrection: How did South Korea get here?

Sources: Jerusalem Post, GDELT, Ukrinform, SCMP, Al Jazeera, ASTRA Independent [tg:ru_milblog], Times of Israel, Washington Post World, Financial Times, DoD News, BBC World, Guardian Ukraine, NYT Middle East, Google News Reuters World, Google News Reuters ME, Colonelcassad [tg:ru_milblog], Defense News, Military Times, AMK Mapping [tg:mapping], The War Zone, Guardian Middle East, Supernova+ [tg:ua_osint], CYPERSPEC Air/UAV [tg:air_defense], TFR/Airspace Closure News, Breaking Defense, NYT World, USNI News, Foreign Policy, Operatyvnyi ZSU [tg:ua_osint], The Diplomat, War on the Rocks, Google News Middle East, Defense One, MilInfoLive [tg:ru_milblog], Kalibrated Analysis [tg:satellite], Ukrainska Pravda, RV Voenkor [tg:ru_milblog], Two Majors [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Kyiv Independent, Google News Reuters Ukraine, Google News Reuters Africa, Defence Blog, Azov Brigade [tg:ua_frontline], Long War Journal, Ukrainian Witness [tg:air_defense], Readovka [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Ukraine, Google News CENTCOM, SBU Security Service [tg:ua_intel], WarGonzo [tg:ru_milblog], Rybar [tg:ru_milblog], Turned on War [tg:ru_milblog], War Translated [tg:en_analysis], Military Summary [tg:en_analysis], Voenkor Kotenok [tg:ru_milblog], ATESH Partisan Movement [tg:ua_intel]
